shadcn2fluid_accordion.description: Everything you need to know about getting started.

items.title: How do I create a new project?
items.description: Click the + button in the sidebar to start a new project from scratch or use a template.

items.title: Can I invite team members?
items.description: Yes, go to Settings > Team and enter their email addresses to send invitations.

items.title: What integrations are available?
items.description: We support Slack, GitHub, GitLab, Jira, and over 50 other tools via our API.

items.title: Is there a free plan?
items.description: Our Starter plan is free forever for up to 3 users and 5 projects.

shadcn2fluid_content-highlight.description: Teams that automate their workflows see 3x productivity gains within the first quarter.
shadcn2fluid_content-highlight.content: Manual processes are the silent killer of productivity. Our platform identifies bottlenecks in your workflow and suggests automations that save your team hours every week. From approval chains to data synchronization, we handle the tedious work so you can focus on strategy.

shadcn2fluid_content-sidebar.description: A unified platform for teams that want to move faster without sacrificing quality.
shadcn2fluid_content-sidebar.content: Our platform combines project management, analytics, and collaboration tools into a single workspace. With real-time dashboards, customizable workflows, and native integrations with your favorite tools, everything your team needs is in one place.

shadcn2fluid_definition-list.description: Key concepts and definitions used throughout our platform.

items.title: Workspace
items.description: A shared environment where team members collaborate on projects, manage tasks, and access shared resources.

items.title: Pipeline
items.description: An automated sequence of stages that data or tasks flow through, from input to completion.

items.title: Webhook
items.description: A user-defined callback that sends real-time notifications to external services when specific events occur.

items.title: Role-Based Access Control
items.description: A security model that restricts system access based on the roles assigned to individual users.

shadcn2fluid_directions.description: Visit our headquarters in the heart of San Francisco.
shadcn2fluid_directions.content: Located at 123 Innovation Drive, Suite 400, San Francisco, CA 94105. We are two blocks from the Montgomery Street BART station. Visitor parking is available in the building garage. Our office hours are Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM PST.

shadcn2fluid_download-form.description: Get the 2026 State of Enterprise Automation report with insights from 500+ CTOs.

shadcn2fluid_emergency-contact.description: Critical issues require immediate attention. Our emergency response team is available 24/7.
shadcn2fluid_emergency-contact.content: For production-critical incidents, call our emergency hotline at +1 (555) 911-0000 or email emergency@acmeplatform.com. Average response time for P1 incidents is under 15 minutes. For non-critical issues, please use our standard support channels.

shadcn2fluid_faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our platform.

items.title: What payment methods do you accept?
items.description: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfers for annual plans.

items.title: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.description: Yes, you can cancel at any time. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.

items.title: Do you offer refunds?
items.description: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.

items.title: Is my data portable?
items.description: You can export all your data at any time in CSV, JSON, or XML formats.

items.title: 1. Create Your Workspace

shadcn2fluid_pricing-faq.description: Common questions about billing and plans.

items.title: Can I switch plans later?
items.description: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

items.title: What happens after my trial ends?
items.description: You'll be moved to the Free plan unless you choose to subscribe.

items.title: Do you offer annual billing?
items.description: Yes, annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly.

shadcn2fluid_pricing-slider.description: Adjust your plan based on your usage. Slide to see pricing.
